title: Grab Bars & Handrails
metaTitle: San Diego's Premiere Grab Bars and Handrails Installer
metaDescription: Aging-In-Place Remodeling is San Diego's Premiere Grab Bars and Handrails installer offering a wide variety of bars including custom fabricated handrails.
intro: Aging-In-Place Remodeling has installed over 4,000 grab bars and handrails. We maintain an inventory of 100+ grab bars in white and stainless steel, ranging from 16" to 48", with typical fulfillment within 24-48 hours. We install across tile, fiberglass, drywall, and other materials while offering aesthetic customization to match home décor.

subServices.name: Straight Grab Bars
subServices.description: Available in 16", 24", and 32" lengths. 1¼" diameter stainless steel construction, welded flanges rated for 300+ lbs, concealed flange covers, available in white, stainless, or custom finishes.

subServices.name: Angled Grab Bars
subServices.description: Multiple configurations of curved or angled bars suitable for toilet areas or continuous wall coverage, available in various sizes and finishes.

subServices.name: Custom Grab Bars
subServices.description: Metal fabrication services producing bars in specific sizes, designs, or finishes, with powder-coating or anodizing options available.

subServices.name: Handrails
subServices.description: Custom design and installation for interior/exterior applications using metal, wood, or composite materials.

subServices.name: Extend A Hand Grab Bar
subServices.description: Patented folding and locking grab bar combining a conventional wall-mounted bar with an extension arm supporting 600+ lbs, extending 12" when raised.

subServices.name: Super Pole
subServices.description: Expansion fit, floor to ceiling pole providing support for sitting/standing, installable in any room.

subServices.name: Fold Up Safety Rails
subServices.description: Space-saving balance-assist aids with flexible hand positions, swinging against walls. Available in powder-coated steel or stainless, supporting up to 440 lbs.
